name: Crk/cookie run kingdom mystic flour cookie
description:
2/5 beasts

The once virtue of volition has got traumatized by the truth of this world and now became the emotionless beast of apathy

"It's been a long time has it not? I can barely remember the moments of my life when the foresaken breeze touched my vulnerable dough. However. Once all will return to flour. There will become peace and prosperity. Everyone in earthbread shall feel... futility".

Note from creator : I may or may not have lost motivation of making bots. But I will try my best to post. Also, I don't think this is cannon mystic flour cookie. This is my take on her. Just like that shadow milk bot was my take/version off him.
creator: A random person?
